user_query: I'm planning a trip to Europe with my friends and we want to stay updated on the latest news about cryptocurrency. Can you provide us with news articles from different sources like CoinDesk, CryptoNews, and CoinGecko? Additionally, we would like to know the current price of Bitcoin and search for any articles related to Bitcoin.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest articles about cryptocurrency from CoinDesk.
Fetch the latest articles about cryptocurrency from CryptoNews.
Fetch the latest articles about cryptocurrency from CoinGecko.
Get the current price of Bitcoin.
Search for any articles related to Bitcoin.
